homeHero.title: Hi, I'm Ricardo Canul
homeHero.description: A passionate software developer specializing in web development. I create modern and responsive websites and applications that provide seamless user experiences.

homeAbout.title: About Me
homeAbout.header: Building Tomorrow's Backend and Optimizing Today's Frontend
description_paragraphs: Hi! I'm Ricardo Canul, a Full-Stack developer passionate about writing clean, efficient, and scalable code. I move fluently between backend development with PHP / Python and creating dynamic, responsive interfaces.

My focus isn't just on making things work, but making them work fast: I have proven experience auditing web performance and designing automated pipelines (Docker, Ansible, GitHub Actions) that make life easier for development teams. I live in Poland, speak Spanish, English and basic Polish, and am always ready to join collaborative teams where innovation and creative problem-solving are the priority.

phpDevelopment.title: PHP Development
phpDevelopment.description: Robust backend development focusing on modern ecosystems and enterprise solutions.

pythonDevelopment.title: Python Development
pythonDevelopment.description: Versatile programming for web APIs, automation, and data processing.

projects.listingDescription: A collection of web applications and scalable systems developed with technical precision and a focus on user experience.
